summary: Block B backend + frontend smoke testing. Backend: 14/14 tests pass (character templates CRUD, AI match, new character fields incl. racial_traits/class_features/cantrips_known/spells_known as List[Dict], temp HP + current_hp clamping on PATCH, SRD spells class_name + level filtering). Frontend: Premade page renders all 12 templates with 'Use Template' buttons. Basic page exposes all required data-testids (basic-name, basic-edition, basic-level, basic-class, basic-race, basic-background, basic-skill-*, basic-submit). Full Builder page has correct step progression testids (step-edition/race/class/background/abilities/skills/equipment/review baseline, edition-2014/2024, builder-next/prev/back, clear-draft). Full multi-step wizard flow verification blocked by token budget on Human-language-picker transition - recommended for next iteration or main agent self-verify.

tests: TestCharacterCreate::test_patch_temp_hp_and_current_hp_clamp (temp HP=5, current_hp=999 clamps to max_hp=7, then set 3 persists) PASS
TestSRDSpellsFilter::test_wizard_only (all returned spells contain Wizard class) PASS
Premade page lists all 12 templates (Thorne, Elara, Shade, Bromm, Kara, Lysander, Fenn, Selene, Sir Rook, Vex, Ember, Shen) and shows 'Find Best Match' AI button, 'Use Template' buttons per card PASS

Basic page exposes testids: basic-name, basic-edition, basic-level, basic-class, basic-race, basic-background, basic-skill-{acrobatics,animal-handling,athletics,history,insight,intimidation,perception,survival}, basic-submit. Skills granted by Soldier background (Athletics+Intimidation) are pre-applied with checkmark. PASS

Full page exposes testids: step-edition/race/class/background/abilities/skills/equipment/review, edition-2014, edition-2024, builder-prev-btn, builder-next-btn, builder-back-btn, clear-draft-btn. PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Backend model PlayerCharacterCreate requires racial_traits/class_features/cantrips_known/spells_known as List[Dict] (matches CharacterBuilder.js payload lines 504-512 which wraps names in {name}). Do NOT pass plain strings - 422 error.

character_templates.py uses ruleset_id filter correctly; all 12 templates are tagged dnd5e_2014. No 2024-tagged templates exist yet, so the edition filter works but 2024-only mode would return []. Non-blocking but worth confirming with user.

AI match endpoint rationale: tag-based fallback activates when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is available but LLM call wrapped in try/except so will not fail tests; confirmed keyword-map scoring returns Fighter/Paladin/Barbarian for 'tank' and caster classes for 'magic/caster'.
HP PATCH: current_hit_points clamping to max_hit_points is verified (999 -> 7 for Half-Elf Wizard). temporary_hit_points accepted and persisted.

CharacterBuilder.js has all required conditional-step testids (spell-*, equipment-A/B, fighting-style-*, floating-asi-*, language-*, versatility-*, subrace-*, subclass-select) at correct lines; full end-to-end Half-Elf+Wizard flow through Spells/Gear steps not executed due to token budget.
action_items: Main agent can self-verify the remaining UI flows (Full wizard 9-step with Wizard class, Half-Elf ASI+versatility+language pickers, Fighter fighting-style requirement, character sheet HP/temp HP reload persistence, conditions indicators on rolls) by running Playwright or manual test - all supporting testids are present in source.
Consider adding a dnd5e_2024 tagged template set if 2024 rules are expected to surface premades too (currently edition filter returns [] for 2024).
seed_data_creation: 1 test wizard created and deleted in test_zzz_cleanup (name=TEST_BlockB_Wizard).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Block B endpoints fully verified via pytest. Frontend routes /characters/new/premade, /characters/new/basic, /characters/new/full all load with correct testids. For deeper UI verification: login -> goto /characters/new/full -> clear-draft-btn -> edition-2014 -> next -> race-Half-Elf -> fill floating-asi-strength + floating-asi-dexterity + language-elvish + language-dwarvish (both pickers) -> next -> class-Wizard (verify step-spells appears in testid list) -> background-Sage -> next through abilities -> skills (versatility-* should show 2 extra) -> spells (spell-fire-bolt etc., 3 cantrips + 6 L1) -> equipment-A/equipment-B -> review -> submit. HP/temp HP persistence already verified at API layer.
